qsim.ScreenerProfile

Description
qsim
Qsim - Multiline screening simulation application

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final ScreenerProfile[]
    PolicyP2.Group.myprofiles
    All profiles supported by this lane's screening device.
    (package private) ScreenerProfile[]
    Queue.myprofiles
    All profiles supported by this lane's screening device
    (package private) final ScreenerProfile[]
    Parameters.profiles
    All profiles that can be available to any screening device.
    (package private) ScreenerProfile
    Queue.Arrival.sp
    The ScreenerProfile becomes associated with the Arrival object once processing starts, and remains associated with it as a permanent record

    Method
    Description
    (package private) ScreenerProfile
    PolicyP2.Group.bracket(int k)
    The two profiles, "lower" (0) and "higher" (1), bracketing the desired detection rate.

    Looks for the parameters of a screener profile in the option store

    Looks up the j-th profile for Lane k
